# Killdozer Tapes Archive

Transcript provenance and authorship:
- Initial transcription was generated with Buzz using Whisper Large-v3.
- Later editing was performed by Leonard Bogard with limited human ear-checking and Codex/ChatGPT-assisted cleanup.
- The transcripts are partially reviewed research aids, not fully human-certified verbatim transcripts.
- See provenance.html, Codex_Change_Report_2026-07-13.txt, and Transcription_QA_Timestamp_Sample_Report.txt before treating the text as authoritative.

This archive exposes synchronized audio transcripts in several forms:
- Human SPA: index.html
- Process and authorship notes: provenance.html
- Separate generated analysis reports: analysis/index.html
- Machine catalog: data/catalog.json
- Crawlable transcript pages: transcripts/*.html
- Original transcript text/caption files: TXT, VTT, and SRT files in the archive root

Analysis reports under analysis/ are Codex/ChatGPT-generated interpretive aids, not transcripts, not primary sources, and not part of the archive's core transcript corpus. The timeline intentionally steel-mans Marvin Heemeyer's grievance narrative where the transcripts leave ordering ambiguity.

Supporting evidence retained with the archive includes Original Transcriptions Backup/, locally generated 44.1 kHz / 16-bit WAV transcodes that are intentionally not published because of file size, Buzz conversion screenshot.png, and QA/change reports.
Prefer timestamped VTT/SRT cues when citing exact locations, and verify quotations against the audio when accuracy matters.
